docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BURNS, NANCY AS TO DEFENDANT CANITES, GIBSON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-15-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
COURT ORDERED TRANSFER TO LIMITED JURISDICTION #413504.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-15-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-17-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 COMMISSIONER KAPLAN DISCLOSED POSSIBLE GROUNDS FOR DISQUALIFICATION. ONE OF THE PARTIES DOES NOT WAIVE THE POSSIBLE CONFLICT.
